title: Play Or Perish
description: a horror mod where a little girl abby wants to play games with you
body:
- abby is a little girl that was missing for over a few years now but she made a sudden appearance in your world all she wants is to play some games with you like riddles but dont make her become bored because when she is bored she will find a way to make her boredness go away
- for now only the riddles are there use: /playorperishtrigger event riddle and abaddonsays  <playername> if its not final release or later
- about this mod: this mod adds 2 entity abby (the little girl) and abaddon (the monster) abby spawns and wants to play games with you if she gets to bored aboddon spawns and tries to hunt you down to resets the borddom bar (if its full then aboddon spawns) and aboddon will despawn after it killed a player
- WARNING this mod might trigger scopophobia
- if you want to be update join the discord server (also to report bugs because i am more likely to react faster there)                         









*spoiler note: abby doesnt care if you paused your game
